channel.title: Databases on Saleh Muhammed
channel.description: Recent content in Databases on Saleh Muhammed

item.title: PostgreSQL Notes
item.description: Introduction into PostgreSQL # Notes: SQL commands is not case sensitive, therefore SELECT = select = SeLeCt Selecting # Regular Selection # Select syntax is being like this: SELECT * -- Everything FROM real_person -- Table Name LIMIT 10; -- Getting only they very first 5 IDs. This will print all email (s) from the customer table. Select distinct rows using distinct operator # DISTINCT clause is used to remove duplicates rows from the result output, it keeps only one row for each group if duplicated.
